I will start by defining the relevant variables based on the data format I received, iterating over each vendor's data to compute the ratios. import pandas as pd import io # Defining the content of the extracted Excel data. data = """ | Name | Type | Revenue | Rent | Opened | | Rainforest Bistro | Restaurant | 32771 | 1920 | 2023-07-19 | | Panorama Outfitters | Apparel | 23170 | 1788 | 2023-06-11 | | Zack's Cameras and Trail Mix | Electronics / Food | 33117 | 1001 | 2023-05-12 | | SignPro Custom DeSign | Signage | 21246 | 1121 | 2023-01-30 | | Serenity Indoor Fountains | Decor | 25234 | 6359 | 2023-05-01 | | Budapest Comics | Comics | 12251 | 2461 | 2023-01-03 | | Dottie's Lattes | Restaurant | 34427 | 1293 | 2023-05-31 | | Gumball Utopia | Candy | 13271 | 3420 | 2023-11-04 | | Your Uncle's Basement | Sports Collectibles | 11119 | 8201 | 2023-01-10 | | Carnivore Loan Specialists | Finance | 31000 | 50312 | 2023-03-09 | | Harry's Steakhouse | Restaurant | 46791 | 1327 | 2023-01-08 | | Two Guys Paper Supplies | Office Supplies | 76201 | 1120 | 2023-09-20 | | Dragon Pizza | Restaurant | 10201 | 2000 | 2023-01-20 | | Us Three: The U2 Fan Store | Music | 10201 | 1200 | 2023-09-20 | | Jimmy's Buffett | Restaurant | 10027 | 3201 | 2023-01-20 | | Franz Equipment Rentals | Industrial Supplies | 20201 | 2201 | 2023-03-06 | | Nigel's Board Games | Board Games | 62012 | 2013 | 2023-01-07 | | Destructor's Den | Baby Supplies | 79915 | 5203 | 2023-02-06 | | Hook Me Up | Sporting Goods | 56503 | 1940 | 2023-05-07 | | Slam Dunk | Restaurant | 61239 | 5820 | 2023-10-20 | | Ben's Hungarian-Asian Fusion | Restaurant | 68303 | 2011 | 2023-02-12 | | PleaseBurgers | Restaurant | 20132 | 1402 | 2023-02-15 | | Reagan's Vegan | Restaurant | 20201 | 6201 | 2023-07-20 | | FreshCart Store-to-Table | Restaurant | 83533 | 2751 | 2023-12-08 | """ # Reading data into a DataFrame df = pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(data), sep="|", skipinitialspace=True) df = df.iloc[1:] # Remove the header row df.columns = df.iloc[0] # Set the correct column names df = df[1:] # Drop the actual header row # Convert numeric columns to appropriate types df['Revenue'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Revenue']) df['Rent'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Rent']) # Calculate the revenue-to-rent ratio df['Ratio'] = df['Revenue'] / df['Rent'] # Find the vendor with the least revenue-to-rent ratio least_profitable_vendor = df.loc[df['Ratio'].idxmin()] vendor_name = least_profitable_vendor['Name'] vendor_type = least_profitable_vendor['Type'] print(f"The vendor that makes the least money relative to rent is '{vendor_name}', of type '{vendor_type}'.") '}]
